The '''Mos Eisley Inn''' was an inn located next to [[Desilijic Complex/Legends|Jabba's town house]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was owned and operated by [[Moth Caralli]], a wealthy [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. The Inn was run-down and offered only the bare essentials. The clerk of the Inn also had several underworld contacts.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope Second Edition">[[Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope'', Second Edition]]</ref>
